name: nikolaostolis.com
description: Personal website and professional portfolio for Nikolaos Tolis.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting --project nikolaos-tolis-site
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && firebase hosting:channel:deploy devcontainer-test --expires 7d --project nikolaos-tolis-site
scripts.deploy:preview:pr: npm run build && firebase hosting:channel:deploy pr-local-test --expires 7d --project nikolaos-tolis-site
